mapper.select: SELECT mr.*, u.username, u.real_name FROM meeting_room mr LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON mr.create_user_id = u.user_id WHERE mr.room_id = #{roomId}
SELECT * FROM meeting_room ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT mr.*, u.username, u.real_name FROM meeting_room mr LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON mr.create_user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY mr.create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM meeting_room WHERE room_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{roomName}, '%') ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM meeting_room WHERE room_no = #{roomNo}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM meeting_room WHERE room_no = #{roomNo} AND room_id != #{roomId}
SELECT mr.*, u.username, u.real_name FROM meeting_room mr LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON mr.create_user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY mr.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM meeting_room WHERE room_status = 1 ORDER BY room_name ASC
